findings.description: s2 and s3 are in reversed order relative to the source. Source order is: (1) リクエストの二重送信防止 → (2) 処理済みリクエストの受信防止 → (3) ブラウザのキャッシュ防止. Knowledge file order is: s1=リクエストの二重送信防止, s2=ブラウザのキャッシュ防止, s3=処理済みリクエストの受信防止.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: '処理済みリクエストの受信防止' section (delimited by '---...---') appears immediately after リクエストの二重送信防止, before the '======' ブラウザのキャッシュ防止 heading.

findings.description: s1 hints are missing three of the six supported custom tags listed in the source: WebView_DownloadSubmitTag, WebView_DownloadButtonTag, WebView_DownloadLinkTag.
findings.source_evidence: Source lists all six tags: WebView_SubmitTag, WebView_DownloadSubmitTag, WebView_ButtonTag, WebView_DownloadButtonTag, WebView_SubmitLinkTag, WebView_DownloadLinkTag. Only the three non-Download variants appear in s1 hints.
